title: goniocaulon indicum
intro: Goniocaulon indicum, also known as Bupleurum chinense var. indicum, is an Asian plant species in the family Apiaceae, commonly used in traditional medicine. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiviral effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Goniocaulon indicum include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. It is often prepared as an herbal decoction or tea, and its extracts are used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues and viral infections.
